BIOS
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

UEFI				Yes

Chipset
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

Northbridge			Intel Raptor Lake rev. 01
Southbridge			Intel Raptor Lake-P PCH rev. 01
Bus Specification		PCI-Express 3.0 (8.0 GT/s)
Graphic Interface		PCI-Express
Memory Type			DDR5
Memory Size			16 GBytes
Channels			2 x 32-bit
Memory Frequency		2394.1 MHz (1:24)
Memory Max Frequency		3733.3 MHz
CAS# latency (CL)		40.0
RAS# to CAS# delay (tRCD)	40
RAS# Precharge (tRP)		40
Cycle Time (tRAS)		76
Bank Cycle Time (tRC)		116
Row Refresh Cycle Time (tRFC)	383
Command Rate (CR)		2T
Uncore Frequency		498.8 MHz
Memory Controller Frequency	1197.1 MHz
Host Bridge			0xA708

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

	SMBus address		0x52
	Memory type		DDR5
	Module format		SO-DIMM

	Size			16384 MBytes
	Ranks			1
	Stepping		0xFF
	PMIC #0			Enabled
	PMIC #0 Manufacturer	IDT
	PMIC #1			Disabled
	PMIC #2			Disabled
	Clock Driver (CKD)	Disabled
	Max bandwidth		DDR5-4800 (2400 MHz)
	Channels		2
	Part number		SM5S510A8AEMC
	Serial number		00003630
	Manufacturing date	Week 26/Year 25
	Nominal Voltage		1.10 Volts

	XMP			no
	AMP			no
	EXPO			no

	Secondary bus		0x01
	Int. Line		0x00
	Int. Pin		0x01

	Caps class		PCI Express
	Caps offset		0x40
	Device type		Root Port of PCI-E Root Complex
	Port			5
	Caps version		2.0
	Physical slot		#0
	Presence detect		yes
	Link width		1x (max 1x)
	Link speed		2.5 GT/s (max 8.0 GT/s)

	Caps class		Message Signalled Interrupts
	Caps offset		0x80

	Caps offset		0x90

	Caps offset		0xA0

	Caps offset		0x100

	Caps offset		0x220

	Caps offset		0x150

	Caps offset		0x200

	Caps offset		0xA30
